prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约17425名、18081名、15169名、17299名、17264名，整体波动较大，无明显单边趋势；2023年曾回升至15169名，但2024–2025年又回落至约17300名附近，近两年基本持平在17264–17299名区间；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为4人，2026年缩减至3人，缩幅25%，招生名额减少将加剧竞争，对位次产生上移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第144位持续上升至2026年第87位，排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力和声誉持续增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2023年曾因教师不配合核酸检测事件出现偏负面舆情；2024年声誉转为中性/混合，分数线持续上涨引发保研率争议；抖音热度总排名第32位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，未出现明显负面舆情冲击；第五轮学科评估。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在北京市招生专业涉及金融学、国际经济与贸易、土木工程等；金融/财经/经济大类2024年热度为"分化观望"，土木建筑持续"明显劝退"；北京市考生总数从2021年42037人持续增长至2026年84900人（+29.7%），考生规模大幅扩大，竞争压力显著增加；海南大学位于海南省海口市，对北京考生属跨省报考；该校在北京招生人数极少（每年仅。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17264名、2026年招生计划缩招25%导致竞争加剧、北京考生总数大幅增长29.7%进一步推高竞争压力，以及学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次约14874名，区间14374–15374名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学（观澜湖校区）
- 国际经济与贸易（观澜湖校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 暂无（2026年招生计划中仅3个专业，已按位次分入一档和三档）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木工程（海甸校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14374–15374名内，建议以二档（国际经济与贸易）为主、一档（金融学）冲刺、三档（土木工程）保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<14374名）可重点冲 刺金融学专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hainan University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 17425, 18081, 15169, 17299, and 17264, showing significant fluctuations with no clear unilateral trend; in 2023, it rebounded to 15169, but in 2024–2025 it fell back to around 17300, with the last two years basically stable in the 17264–17299 range; the enrollment plan for Hainan University in Beijing's comprehensive category was 4 students from 2021 to 2025, reduced to 3 students in 2026, a 25% decrease, which will intensify competition and exert upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, a significant improvement reflecting the school's enhanced comprehensive strength and reputation, increasing its appeal to candidates; in 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident due to a teacher's non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing; in 2024, reputation turned neutral/mixed, with rising admission scores sparking controversy over graduate school recommendation rates; Douyin popularity total ranking 32nd (relatively hot), short video platform exposure moderately high, with no obvious negative public opinion impact; fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The school's enrollment majors in Beijing include Finance, International Economics and Trade, Civil Engineering, etc.; the popularity of Finance/Finance/Economics categories in 2024 was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', while Civil Engineering and Architecture continued to be 'clearly discouraged'; the total number of candidates in Beijing grew from 42,037 in 2021 to 84,900 in 2026 (+29.7%), significantly expanding the candidate pool and increasing competitive pressure; Hainan University is located in Haikou, Hainan Province, making it an inter-provincial application for Beijing candidates; the school's enrollment in Beijing is extremely small (only a few each year).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 17264, a 25% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan intensifying competition, a 29.7% increase in the total number of Beijing candidates further raising competitive pressure, and the continuous rise in the school's Soft Science ranking enhancing its appeal, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 14874, with a range of 14374–15374.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Finance (Guanlanhu Campus)
- International Economics and Trade (Guanlanhu Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (only 3 majors in the 2026 enrollment plan, already divided into Tier 1 and Tier 3 by ranking).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14374–15374, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (International Economics and Trade) as the main choice, Tier 1 (Finance) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Civil Engineering) as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14374), you can focus on reaching for the Finance major.
